response.justification: The candidate is a strong polyglot engineer currently at Staff level at Stripe with directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, plus genuine high-throughput distributed-systems work at Sociomantic (millions of requests per second). However, the must-have requirement of strong Python is entirely absent from the resume, the distributed-systems experience is several years old and in niche DLang, and there is little concrete evidence of staff-level technical strategy or cross-functional stakeholder leadership, which are central to this role.
strengths: Current Staff Engineer at Stripe working on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Hands-on high-throughput, low-latency microservices experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Strong TypeScript and software craftsmanship practices (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No Python experience listed anywhere on the resume, despite strong Python being a must-have
Limited demonstrated experience directing technical strategy or managing stakeholders across functions at scale
Core distributed-systems work dates from 2018-2020 and was in DLang, a niche technology
